result.stdout:
Description:
  AI-powered .NET build fixer using coding agent CLIs (Claude Code, GitHub Copilot, Gemini).

Usage:
  AiFixBuild [command] [options]

Options:
  -?, -h, --help  Show help and usage information
  --version       Show version information

Commands:
  fix-build        Fix build errors using a coding agent CLI.
  update-packages  Update NuGet packages and fix any resulting build errors.

commands.payload:
Description:
  AI-powered .NET build fixer using coding agent CLIs (Claude Code, GitHub Copilot, Gemini).

Usage:
  AiFixBuild [command] [options]

Options:
  -?, -h, --help  Show help and usage information
  --version       Show version information

Commands:
  fix-build        Fix build errors using a coding agent CLI.
  update-packages  Update NuGet packages and fix any resulting build errors.

result.stdout:
Description:
  Fix build errors using a coding agent CLI.

Usage:
  AiFixBuild fix-build [options]

Options:
  --agent <agent>              Coding agent to use: claude, copilot, or gemini. Auto-detected if not specified (prefers claude > copilot > gemini).
  --cli-path <cli-path>        Path to the coding agent CLI executable. Auto-detected if not specified.
  --working-dir <working-dir>  The target project directory. Defaults to current directory.
  -?, -h, --help               Show help and usage information

commands.payload:
Description:
  Fix build errors using a coding agent CLI.

Usage:
  AiFixBuild fix-build [options]

Options:
  --agent <agent>              Coding agent to use: claude, copilot, or gemini. Auto-detected if not specified (prefers claude > copilot > gemini).
  --cli-path <cli-path>        Path to the coding agent CLI executable. Auto-detected if not specified.
  --working-dir <working-dir>  The target project directory. Defaults to current directory.
  -?, -h, --help               Show help and usage information

result.stdout:
Description:
  Update NuGet packages and fix any resulting build errors.

Usage:
  AiFixBuild update-packages [options]

Options:
  --filter <filter>            Comma-separated glob patterns to filter packages (e.g. "Microsoft*,Serilog*"). Passed through to lr-nuget-update.
  --agent <agent>              Coding agent to use: claude, copilot, or gemini. Auto-detected if not specified (prefers claude > copilot > gemini).
  --cli-path <cli-path>        Path to the coding agent CLI executable. Auto-detected if not specified.
  --working-dir <working-dir>  The target project directory. Defaults to current directory.
  -?, -h, --help               Show help and usage information

Description:

Usage:

Options:

  --cli-path <cli-path>        Path to the coding agent CLI executable. Auto-detected if not specified.
  --working-dir <working-dir>  The target project directory. Defaults to current directory.
  -?, -h, --help               Show help and usage information
